name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-5
title: Tech stack unification: replace mixed shell/bash/python with a single clean portable stack
description: Tech stack unified to python. All bash scripts with embedded python3 heredocs or inline python3 -c calls across contract, rabbit-cage, and rabbit-feature-scope features must be converted to pure Python scripts invoked as 'python3 script.py'. Callers must be updated to match.

history.note: TDD cycle complete across contract, rabbit-cage, rabbit-feature-scope

tdd_report.request: Tech stack unified to python. Convert all bash scripts with embedded python3 heredocs or inline python3 -c calls to pure Python scripts invoked as python3 script.py. Update all callers.
tdd_report.test_gap_analysis: No tests existed for python-extraction invariant. Tests were written to assert that each affected .sh has no embedded python3 heredocs/inline calls and that a companion .py file exists.
tdd_report.impl_summary: Extracted Python logic from six bash scripts into standalone .py files: find-feature.py, check-maps-consistent.py, render-template.py, workspace-map.py, audit-orphan-storage.py, check-template-schema-producer-consistency.py. Each .sh caller was updated to invoke the corresponding .py via 'python3 script.py' with shell-safe argument passing. The render-template.py was redesigned to accept key=value pairs directly as argv, eliminating the last remaining inline python3 -c call used for JSON escaping. All new .py files are executable. Functional behavior is preserved: find-feature --list/--list-json/lookup, workspace-map show/audit/human/backlog modes, render-template substitution, check-maps-consistent registry sync, audit-orphan-storage, and check-template-schema-producer-consistency all produce identical outputs to the original implementations.
